creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 239357
Patch to create security/rubygem-scp3 and security/rubygem-sftp3 for backwards compatibility

Hi,

some of the last updates broke the sysutils/vagrant package.
Namely the security/rubygem-net-scp and security/rubygem-net-sftp packages. Vagrant needs version 3 of these to run. I created two patches that will create these ports. Let me know if I should submit them via different means (seperately or so).

Kind regards,

Jens
